emails.subject: Assignment and Assumption
emails.body: Assignment and Assumption I spoke with Bear Stearns this morning and all that they require to move an account from one family to another is a letter signed by authorized signatories. I have drafted the letter and I will sent it to them if there are no problems with this from the legal department. Please let me know. Thanks, Terri

emails.subject: Re: Assignment and Assumption
emails.body: Re: Assignment and Assumption Does ENA have an existing Account Agreement with Bear Stearns, which will govern the transferred account? Terri Harlan 10/11/2000 11:38 AM

emails.subject: Re: Assignment and Assumption
emails.body: Terri: The letter is ok if you change SZP family to "ECT Investments, Inc." and the "TZJ Family" to Enron North America Corp." Alan Terri Harlan 10/11/2000 12:02 PM
